title: begonia ovatifolia
intro: Begonia ovatifolia, also known as Begonia x corallina 'Lavender Charm', is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Begoniaceae family and is primarily grown for its ornamental purposes. The leaves of this plant are known to have medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant is also rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and promoting relaxation. The leaves can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations.
